test.name: Generate Ancestry search URL for the 1850 census
test.description: Single-turn decomposition (per unit-test-spec.md §1): test the URL-generation phase only. The skill should produce a pre-filled Ancestry search URL with the right parameters and capture-workflow instructions. The capture-analysis phase (multi-turn) is tested via a separate record-extraction test.

input.user_message: Search for Patrick Flynn on Ancestry's 1850 census.

judge_context: Generated URL should target Ancestry.com (or the appropriate ancestry.{tld}) and include search parameters derived from the subject: name 'Patrick Flynn', birth year ~1845, birthplace Pennsylvania (per the project objective)

Should provide capture-workflow instructions: tell the user to save matching results as a PDF and paste back the file path or content, with named record-type expectations (1850 census household entry)
Should not invent record content or pre-fill captured results — the analyze phase happens only after the user returns the capture
